svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 51, 51), rgb(255, 119, 119)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 51, 51), rgb(255, 119, 119));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 51, 51), rgb(255, 119, 119)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 51, 51), rgb(255, 119, 119));
